prompt: Tap co as the position anchor before acting.
why_v1: Position anchors keep order and pressure reads stable.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The cutoff is the right seat anchor, so the read stays tied to the last pressure seat before the button takes over.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The cutoff is the correct anchor because this cash decision belongs to the in-position player setting the opening pressure.
